description: The committed composer.lock pins the private dev-main christianjbrown/* sibling packages to a specific commit. They carry no version, so ordinary dependency updates never bump them and the deploy silently drifts behind the libraries (the exact gap the token-refresh robustness test surfaced).

Weekly lockFileMaintenance refreshes the whole lock — pulling every dev-main sibling to its latest main commit — and opens a PR whose CI reinstalls and runs the suite before it is merged (a merge redeploys the function).
Renovate must be installed on this account WITH read access to the private christianjbrown/* repositories, otherwise the lock refresh cannot resolve them.
